MRI Knee Report: MRI of the right knee was performed without contrast on a 1.5T scanner using standard knee protocol sequences. Findings reveal a complete tear of the anterior cruciate ligament (ACL) with bone bruising of the lateral femoral condyle and lateral tibial plateau, consistent with a pivot-shift injury mechanism. The medial meniscus shows a complex tear involving the posterior horn. The articular cartilage demonstrates mild chondromalacia at the medial compartment, grade II changes per the Outerbridge classification.
